references.description: Security of processing when credentials protecting personal data are insufficiently protected.
references.condition: The affected system processes personal data as defined by GDPR Art. 4

references.description: ICT security requiring proper protection of credentials for financial entities.
references.condition: The affected system is part of the ICT infrastructure of a financial entity subject to DORA

references.description: Password security measures required for essential and important entities.
references.condition: The entity is an essential or important entity subject to NIS2

references.description: Authentication information controls including credential protection.
